projectDescription: A minimalist, agent-first desktop code editor built for AI-assisted development, featuring tree-sitter syntax highlighting, integrated git, LSP support, multi-agent swarms, and a built-in extension system.
keyFeatures: Tree-sitter syntax highlighting for JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Rust, C++, HTML, CSS, JSON, YAML, Markdown, and more
Multi-pane buffer management with drag-and-drop tab reordering
AI agent execution loop with tool-calling (read, write, grep, shell, browser control)
Swarms view: multi-agent coordination with force-directed graph, Kanban board, and chat
Integrated git: visual commit history, line-level blame, status panel, staging, and commit
Language Server Protocol (LSP) support with completions, diagnostics, hover, and go-to-definition
Extension system with a full TedAPI surface for commands, panels, status bar, file icons, and fs access
Multiple LLM providers: Ollama (local), OpenAI, Anthropic (Claude), Google (Gemini)
Semantic theming system with light and dark variants
High-density file tree (20px row height) optimized for large projects
Command palette for fast keyboard-driven navigation
publicApiSurface: ExtensionManifest: { name, version, displayName, description, main, activationEvents }

Agent tools: read_file, edit_file, list_dir, grep, codebase_search, file_search, delete_file, run_terminal_cmd, browser_open, browser_click, browser_type, browser_read, browser_scroll, browser_hover, browser_close, schedule_request
Settings: autoSave, theme, fontSize, lineNumbers, indentGuides, volume, uiBlur, sidebarWidth, llm.provider, llm.model, llm.apiKey, llm.baseUrl, lsp.enabled, lsp.servers
